title: Fast RTP
description: Fast RTP – Random Teleport for Minecraft 1.21.5
body:
Fast RTP – Random Teleport for Minecraft 1.21.5

Teleport anywhere in your world with a single command!
This lightweight datapack adds a /function simple_rtp:rtp command that randomly teleports the player to a safe location within a 10,000 block radius. Great for survival exploration, server hubs, or just a fresh start.

✅ Easy to install
✅ No setup required
✅ Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
✅ Teleports safely above ground

Drop it in your world’s datapacks folder and type:
/function rtp:rtp to teleport!
